title: Smoky German Sausage with Noodles
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring smoky German sausage served with a side of noodles and a crunchy flatbread

ingredients.name: Smoky German Sausage
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen sausage works well

ingredients.name: Flatbread
ingredients.notes: Crusty bread ideal for serving with the sausage

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced onion adds a sweet flavor

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Minced garlic adds depth to the dish

ingredients.name: Beer
ingredients.notes: German beer pairs well with the sausage

ingredients.name: Mustard
ingredients.notes: Grainy mustard adds a tangy flavor

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt for best flavor

instructions: 2. Slice the onion and cook in a pan over medium heat until caramelized.
3. Slice the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
4. Slice the sausage and cook in a separate pan over medium-high heat until browned.
5. Add the beer to the sausage pan and simmer until reduced by half.
6. Cook the noodles according to package instructions.
7. Assemble the dish by placing cooked noodles on a plate, topping with sliced sausage and onions, and serving with flatbread on the side.
8. Drizzle with mustard and season with salt and pepper to taste.
